| 1. Psychological Impact of Global Crisis Awareness | 72 | Heuristic recognizes emotional resonance and actionable tips; heuristic for hook sharpness is moderate—focused on emotional engagement but lacks a bold, attention-grabbing element. |

| 3. Legal Restrictions and Personal Identity | 65 | Clear and empowering, but slightly less emotive; heuristic for hook sharpness is moderate, with potential for more compelling language to draw immediate attention. |
| 4. Entrepreneurial Self-Doubt | 79 | Energetic, relatable, and inspiring—good hook potential; heuristic for sharpness is high, with vivid visuals and affirmations creating immediacy and engagement. |
| 5. SaaS Market Uncertainty | 70 | Timely and solution-oriented, but somewhat technical; heuristic for hook sharpness is moderate—could benefit from a more provocative framing to stand out. |
| 6. Online Privacy Anxiety | 60 | Calm and reassuring, but less urgent; heuristic for hook sharpness is low to moderate, as it may lack immediate attention-grabbing appeal. |
| 7. Moral Panic and Societal Safety | 75 | Community focus and hope-building enhance engagement; heuristic for hook sharpness is good due to collective themes but could be more striking visually or verbally. |
| 8. Climate Change Anxiety | 73 | Positive framing and hope appeal; heuristic for hook sharpness is moderate, effective but not highly provocative or compelling. |
| 9. Ethical Dilemmas in AI | 78 | Timely and ethically engaging with philosophical depth; heuristic for hook sharpness is good, especially with symbolic imagery and moral framing that draw in interest. |
| 10. Reputation Management & Emotional Resilience | 74 | Empathetic and practical, likely to resonate; heuristic for hook sharpness is moderate—good emotional tone but lacks a striking hook element. |
